title: Junior Business Analyst (f/m/x) - Retail
required_skills: Execution and impact on multi-product initiatives with leadership
bonus_skills: Data visualization (Tableau, Power BI or similar)
matched_skills: Project execution with leadership interface (HSBC USD 8M programme)
missing_skills: Excel / G Suite (not explicitly stated in CV)
core_responsibilities: Build automated data solutions providing strategic insights for top management
Produce reports and dashboards for Product Management and Business teams
Communicate analyses and technical trade-offs to executives and engineers
Monitor and control business outcomes for the product team
Analyze, model, and evaluate Retail Sales pipeline performance across website and partner platforms
recommended_emphasis: Highlight executive-level reporting and dashboard delivery (HSBC, Minth Group) as direct evidence of producing strategic insights for top management
Emphasize cross-functional and cross-regional stakeholder coordination to address the communication requirement
Quantify reporting scope: 12 product lines at Minth, USD 8M programme at HSBC
Mention any Excel or G Suite usage explicitly in experience bullets
If any SQL or BI tool exposure exists (even coursework), surface it to close the most critical missing skill gap
